annotations.grafana.app/message: Increase default time-range for the dashboard

spec.expr:
sum(
  count_over_time(
    {job="nginx", req_class=~"page|asset"}
    | json
    | __error__ = ""
    | is_probe = 0
    | request_method =~ "GET|POST|HEAD"
    | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
    | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*/\\.(aws|git|env|boto|netrc|s3cfg|svn|hg|docker).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*terraform\\.tfstate.*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*\\$\\(pwd\\).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*/~.*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|adminer|cgi-bin|server-status|server-info|actuator|swagger|graphql).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.\\./|%2e%2e%2f|%2e%2e/|/etc/|/var/log/|apache2|registry/config|amplify\\.ya?ml|netlify\\.toml|docker-compose\\.ya?ml|sam-template\\.ya?ml|serverless\\.ya?ml|next\\.config\\.(mjs|js|ts)|aws[_/-]?config|aws/s3/credentials|^/env$|^/api/|^/_vercel/).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(^/webhook(?:/.*)?$|^/s3(?:/.*)?$|^/old/aws_config$|^/var/task/.*)"
    | uri !~ "^/\\{.*"
    [$__range]
  )
)

sum(
  count_over_time(
    {job="nginx", req_class=~"page|asset"}
    | json
    | __error__ = ""
    | is_probe = 0
    | request_method =~ "GET|POST|HEAD"
    | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
    | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*/\\.(aws|git|env|boto|netrc|s3cfg|svn|hg|docker).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*terraform\\.tfstate.*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*\\$\\(pwd\\).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*/~.*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|adminer|cgi-bin|server-status|server-info|actuator|swagger|graphql).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.\\./|%2e%2e%2f|%2e%2e/|/etc/|/var/log/|apache2|registry/config|amplify\\.ya?ml|netlify\\.toml|docker-compose\\.ya?ml|sam-template\\.ya?ml|serverless\\.ya?ml|next\\.config\\.(mjs|js|ts)|aws[_/-]?config|aws/s3/credentials|^/env$|^/api/|^/_vercel/).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(^/webhook(?:/.*)?$|^/s3(?:/.*)?$|^/old/aws_config$|^/var/task/.*)"
    | uri !~ "^/\\{.*"
    | request_time > 4
    [$__range]
  )
)

1000 * max by () (
  max_over_time(
    {job="nginx", req_class=~"page|asset"}
    | json
    | __error__ = ""
    | is_probe = 0
    | request_method =~ "GET|POST|HEAD"
    | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
    | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*/\\.(aws|git|env|boto|netrc|s3cfg|svn|hg|docker).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*terraform\\.tfstate.*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*\\$\\(pwd\\).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*/~.*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|adminer|cgi-bin|server-status|server-info|actuator|swagger|graphql).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.\\./|%2e%2e%2f|%2e%2e/|/etc/|/var/log/|apache2|registry/config|amplify\\.ya?ml|netlify\\.toml|docker-compose\\.ya?ml|sam-template\\.ya?ml|serverless\\.ya?ml|next\\.config\\.(mjs|js|ts)|aws[_/-]?config|aws/s3/credentials|^/env$|^/api/|^/_vercel/).*"
    | uri !~ "(?i).*(^/webhook(?:/.*)?$|^/s3(?:/.*)?$|^/old/aws_config$|^/var/task/.*)"
    | uri !~ "^/\\{.*"
    | unwrap request_time
    | __error__ = ""
    [5m]
  )
)

100 *

    | uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|adminer|cgi-bin|server-status|server-info|actuator|swagger|graphql).*"
